content:
# Final Review Proposal
**Producer:** agent:claude/claude-opus-4-6

## Summary

Clean implementation of Claude reasoning effort support. Mirrors the established Codex suffix-in-model-id pattern. The `claude_model_and_reasoning_effort()` function correctly strips effort suffixes and passes `--effort <level>` to the Claude CLI (verified against actual CLI help). Default for Claude final_reviewer correctly set to `claude-opus-4-6-max`. Two new tests cover new session and resume scenarios. All changed files pass clippy and formatting checks. No bugs, safety issues, or correctness gaps found.

## Amendments

None.
